title: Terms of Service
legalNotice: These Terms of Service are based on industry best practices and legal requirements. They should be reviewed by qualified legal counsel before implementation.

blocks.text: By accessing and using Bendgamine ("Service", "App", "Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access the Service.
Bendgamine is a digital self-improvement platform based on Benjamin Franklin's virtue development methodology.

items: Digital implementation of Benjamin Franklin's 13 virtues system
Weekly planning and action tracking interface
AI-powered personalized recommendations
Progress analytics and reporting
Custom virtue creation and project management

blocks.text: We strive to keep the Service available 24/7, but cannot guarantee uninterrupted access. The Service may be temporarily unavailable due to maintenance, updates, or technical issues.

items: Free Plan: Limited functionality with basic features
Premium Plan: Enhanced features and AI recommendations
Pro Plan: Full functionality with unlimited access

blocks.text: To use certain features, you must create an account by providing:

items: Valid email address
Secure password meeting our requirements
First and last name
Acceptance of these Terms and Privacy Policy
Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
All activities that occur under your account
Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use
Ensuring accuracy of your account information

blocks.text: You must be at least 13 years old to use the Service. Users under 18 require parental consent.
You may use the Service for:

items: Personal self-improvement and virtue development
Tracking your daily actions and progress
Setting and achieving personal goals
Accessing AI-generated insights and recommendations
Violate any applicable laws or regulations
Infringe on intellectual property rights
Upload malicious code or attempt to hack the Service
Create multiple accounts to circumvent limitations
Share account credentials with others
Use the Service for commercial purposes without authorization
Harass, abuse, or harm other users
Attempt to reverse engineer the Service
Be your own original creation or properly licensed
Not contain illegal, harmful, or offensive material
Respect the privacy and rights of others
Comply with our Community Guidelines
The Service platform and software
Franklin's virtue methodology implementation
AI algorithms and recommendation systems
Trademarks, logos, and branding
All Service-related content and materials
Personal data and content you create
Your virtue tracking data and progress
Custom virtues and personal reflections
Any original content you submit

blocks.text: By using the Service, you grant us a limited license to:

items: Process your data to provide the Service
Generate AI recommendations based on your usage patterns
Create anonymized analytics for Service improvement
Display your content within the Service interface

blocks.text: Your privacy is important to us. Please review our Privacy Policy, which also governs your use of the Service.
We collect and process data as described in our Privacy Policy, including:

items: Account information and preferences
Virtue tracking data and daily actions
Usage patterns and analytics
Device and technical information

blocks.text: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption, secure storage, and access controls.
Detailed information about our subscription plans, features, and pricing is available on our website and within the Service.
New users may be eligible for a free trial period. Trial terms will be clearly disclosed at signup.

items: Subscriptions are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis
Payment is due immediately upon subscription activation
We use third-party payment processors (Stripe) for secure transactions
All fees are non-refundable except as required by law or our Refund Policy

blocks.text: Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled before the renewal date. You can cancel anytime through your account settings.
We may modify subscription prices with 30 days advance notice. Changes apply to subsequent billing cycles.
You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period.
We may suspend or terminate your account if you:

items: Violate these Terms of Service
Engage in fraudulent or illegal activities
Compromise the security or integrity of the Service
Fail to pay required fees
Your access to the Service will cease
We may delete your account and data after a reasonable period
You can request data export before termination
Certain provisions of these Terms will survive termination

blocks.text: Our Service uses artificial intelligence to provide personalized recommendations based on:

items: Your virtue tracking patterns
Goal achievement history
Usage behavior and preferences
Anonymized data from other users
Suggestions only, not professional advice
Based on algorithmic analysis, not human expertise
Subject to errors and limitations
Not suitable for medical, therapeutic, or professional guidance
AI systems may make mistakes
You are responsible for evaluating and acting on recommendations
You should consult qualified professionals for serious concerns
We do not guarantee accuracy of AI-generated content

blocks.text: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND. WE DISCLAIM ALL WARRANTIES, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.
Bendgamine is not a substitute for:

items: Professional psychological or therapeutic services
Medical advice or treatment
Financial or legal counseling
Educational or career guidance

blocks.text: We do not guarantee that using the Service will:

items: Improve your personal development outcomes
Achieve specific goals or results
Provide accurate predictions about your progress
Replace professional guidance or treatment

blocks.text: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, OUR LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID FOR THE SERVICE IN THE 12 MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.
WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR:

items: INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES
LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, OR BUSINESS OPPORTUNITIES
PERSONAL INJURY OR EMOTIONAL DISTRESS
DAMAGES ARISING FROM SERVICE INTERRUPTIONS

blocks.text: We are not liable for delays or failures due to circumstances beyond our reasonable control, including natural disasters, government actions, or technical infrastructure failures.
You agree to indemnify and hold us harmless from claims arising from:

items: Your use of the Service
Violation of these Terms
Infringement of third-party rights
Your content or activities on the Service

blocks.text: These Terms are governed by the laws of [Jurisdiction — TBD], without regard to conflict of law principles.
Any disputes will be resolved through binding arbitration rather than court proceedings, except for:

items: Intellectual property disputes
Small claims court matters
Injunctive relief requests

blocks.text: You agree not to participate in class action lawsuits against us.
These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and any additional terms, constitute the entire agreement between you and Bendgamine.
We may modify these Terms by:

items: Posting updated Terms on our website
Providing notice through the Service or email
Requiring acceptance of new Terms for continued use

blocks.text: If any provision of these Terms is found unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue in full force.
We may assign these Terms to any affiliate or successor. You may not assign your rights without our written consent.
Our failure to enforce any provision does not constitute a waiver of our rights.
